---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

#

::: {.edu-section}

## Education

<details class="edu-card">
<summary>
  <span class="edu-school">University of California, San Diego</span>
  <span class="edu-meta">M.S. in Business Analytics | Jul 2025 – Dec 2026</span>
</summary>

<div class="edu-body">

San Diego, CA

**Relevant Courses**
- AI-Assisted Math & Programming for Business Analytics
- Business Analytics in Marketing, Finance, and Operations
- SQL and ETL
- Collecting and Analyzing Large Data
- Business Intelligence
- Customer Analytics
- Supply Chain Analytics
- Experiments for Business Analytics

</div>
</details>

<details class="edu-card">
<summary>
  <span class="edu-school">Ewha Womans University</span>
  <span class="edu-meta">B.A. in Business Administration & Economics | Mar 2009 – Aug 2013</span>
</summary>

<div class="edu-body">

Seoul, South Korea

**Exchange Program**
- EDHEC Business School, France
  - MSc-level Coursework in Financial Economics

**Relevant Courses**
- Statistics for Business
- Mathematics for Economics
- Management Information Systems
- Introduction to Excel and VBA Programming
- Financial Economics
- Seminars on Economics (Financial Engineering)

</div>
</details>

<details class="edu-card">
<summary>
  <span class="edu-school">Korea National Open University</span>
  <span class="edu-meta">Additional Coursework in Data Science & Statistics | Mar 2023 – Dec 2024</span>
</summary>

<div class="edu-body">

Seoul, South Korea

**Relevant Courses**
- Python Computing
- Linear Algebra
- Statistical Computing with R
- Statistical Analysis Using Excel
- Probability Concepts and Applications
- Introduction to Statistics

</div>
</details>

:::

::: {.edu-section}

## Certifications

- Certified Public Accountant (CPA) <span class="cert-meta">| Washington State, 2025</span>
- SQL Developer <span class="cert-meta">| K-Data, 2025</span>
- Foreign Exchange Manager <span class="cert-meta">| KITA, 2015</span>

## Languages

- Korean (Native)
- English (Fluent)
- Russian (Conversational, TORFL Level 1)
- French (Basic, DELF A1)
:::
